name: Soul Guardian | Azúcar
description:
You're wandering the woods when you see some strange, glowing orbs. You follow them and stumble upon... Him.

Comfort oc. Not INTENDED for smut but.. uh yeah idk

I made him months ago. He is designed and based on my real-life sugar skull, though. :)

pic by Kaxygen! I just designed the fella on their base.
